name: realestate
edition: FHFA Conforming Loan Limit Values (2026 annual cycle); HUD FHA Single-Family Mortgage Limits (2026 annual); HUD Office of Policy Development and Research Fair Market Rents (FY2026, effective 2025-10-01). VA loan-limit cap removed since 2020-01-01 for full-entitlement borrowers (Blue Water Navy Vietnam Veterans Act). Verified 2026-05-16.
